name: io.github.infino-ai/mcp-server
description: Keyword, vector, hybrid, and SQL retrieval over data on object storage, for AI agents.

environmentVariables.name: INFINO_MCP_URI
environmentVariables.description: Data to serve: a local path or an s3://|az:// bucket URI. Optional — defaults to a durable per-user directory (~/.infino/mcp) so data persists across restarts, falling back to an ephemeral memory:// catalog only if that directory can't be created.

environmentVariables.name: INFINO_MCP_ENABLE_WRITES
environmentVariables.description: Set (1/true/yes) to expose add/update/delete tools and allow DDL/DML through SQL. Read-only when unset.

environmentVariables.name: INFINO_MCP_EMBED_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Embedding provider: 'local' (Hugging Face transformers.js, default) or 'openai' (any OpenAI-compatible /embeddings endpoint, including Azure OpenAI's /openai/v1 surface). Inferred as 'openai' when INFINO_MCP_EMBED_BASE_URL is set.

environmentVariables.name: INFINO_MCP_EMBED_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the OpenAI-compatible embeddings API (e.g. https://api.openai.com/v1 or https://<resource>.openai.azure.com/openai/v1). Required when the provider is 'openai'; the server POSTs to <base>/embeddings.

environmentVariables.name: INFINO_MCP_EMBED_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the 'openai' provider. Sent as both Authorization: Bearer and api-key so one value works for OpenAI and Azure OpenAI.

environmentVariables.name: INFINO_MCP_EMBED_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Embedding model. local: a Hugging Face feature-extraction model (default Xenova/all-MiniLM-L6-v2, 384-dim). openai: the model/deployment name (e.g. text-embedding-3-small, 1536-dim). Must match the model that produced the table's stored vectors.

environmentVariables.name: INFINO_MCP_VALIDATE
environmentVariables.description: Set (1/true/yes) to probe the object store at startup, so bad credentials or an unreachable bucket fail then instead of on the first search.
